snippet.title: FATAL FURY: CotW × FIST OF THE NORTH STAR: HOKUTO NO KEN｜KENSHIRO｜Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
From North Star to South Town―
Kenshiro is coming to FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves!
Fists meet Fury in June 2026. 👊⚡

--------------------------------------------------------------

Kenshiro from Fist of the North Star explodes into City of the Wolves Season 2!

The legendary fighter who survived the end of the century descends on South Town in FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves. How will Kenshiro, with his commanding presence, blend in with the game's mechanics and mayhem? Stay tuned for more developments!

What is Fist of the North Star?
Fist of the North Star (Hokuto no Ken) is a Japanese manga franchise created by Buronson and illustrated by Tetsuo Hara. It centers on Kenshiro, sole successor to the ancient Hokuto Shinken martial art, and his fight against evil in a post-apocalyptic world ravaged by nuclear war. Fist of the North Star was serialized in Weekly Shonen Jump magazine in 1983 and has enthralled fans worldwide ever since with its profound universe, unforgettable characterization, and memorable lines.

A brand-new anime iteration—FIST OF THE NORTH STAR—will air on TOKYO MX and BS11 from April 10, 2026 (1 AM JST), with new staff, cast members, and the latest video technologies ushering the franchise into the modern era. Tune in as fearsome warriors battle it out at the end of the century and forge a fresh new legend this year!

--------------------------------------------------------------

Legends unleashed! The Legend Edition bundles the base game with Season Passes 1 and 2—a perfect way to enjoy the franchise's appeal for newcomers and veterans alike!

FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves - Season Pass 2 
- Price: $19.99 / €19.99
- Selling Format: Digital

Contents:
- DLC character: Kim Jae Hoon (Available now)
- DLC character: Nightmare Geese (Available now)
- DLC character: Blue Mary (Available now)
- DLC character: Wolfgang Krauser (April 2026)
- DLC character: ??? (May 2026)
- DLC character: Kenshiro (June 2026)

FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves Legend Edition (Season Pass 1 + 2)
- Price: $49.99 / €49.99
- Selling Format: Digital

Contents:
- Base game
- Season Pass 1 (Andy Bogard / Ken / Joe Higashi / Chun-Li / Mr. Big)
- Season Pass 2 (Kim Jae Hoon / Nightmare Geese / Blue Mary / Wolfgang Krauser / ??? / Kenshiro)

snippet.title: The End of Oak Street | Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
“Our house, our neighborhood, our whole street has moved." The End of Oak Street only in theaters and IMAX August 14. #EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX

After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

Starring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor, THE END OF OAK STREET also stars Maisy Stella and Christian Convery. The film is written and directed by David Robert Mitchell and produced by J.J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Jon Cohen, David Robert Mitchell, Matt Jackson and Tommy Harper. The executive producers are Chris Bender, Jake Weiner, Joanne Lee and Leeann Stonebreaker.

Mitchell’s team behind the camera includes director of photography Michael Gioulakis, production designer Maya Shimoguchi, editor John Axelrad, composer Michael Giacchino and costume designer Erin Benach. 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production, A David Robert Mitchell Film: THE END OF OAK STREET. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on August 14, 2026, and internationally beginning 12 August 2026.

snippet.title: Yami Safdie, Alejandro Sanz - Cuéntame (Video Oficial)
snippet.description:
Yami Safdie, Alejandro Sanz - Cuéntame (Video Oficial)

"Cuéntame" es el esperado encuentro musical entre la frescura generacional de Yami Safdie y la maestría emocional de Alejandro Sanz. En esta balada pop latina, ambos artistas se sumergen en una conversación honesta y cercana que explora la curiosidad que nace al conocer profundamente a la persona que amamos.

Con una letra que transita desde lo cotidiano, como el nombre de una mascota o un libro favorito, hasta los anhelos más profundos, la canción captura ese instante donde la verdadera intimidad comienza con una simple pregunta. La calidez vocal de Yami se entrelaza con la intensidad característica de Sanz para recordarnos que, a veces, el acto más romántico es simplemente querer escucharlo todo.

Escucha *Cuéntame* en todas las plataformas digitales: https://WML.link/Cuentame-YamiSafdiexAlejandroSanz

Suscribite » https://YamiSafdie.lnk.to/Suscripcion

snippet.title: Vicente Fernández - Estos Celos (Letra / Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Vicente Fernández - Estos Celos (Letra / Lyrics)

#vicentefernández #estoscelos

¡Gracias por ver este video! Asegúrate de dejar tu me gusta, comentar y compartir con muchas más personas.

Letra:
[Verso 1]
Te miré: estabas tan bonita, tan sensual... Te imaginé ajena y me hizo mal.
Ay, ay, amor; ay, ay, qué dolor.
Qué tarde comprendí: contigo tenía todo y lo perdí.
Te miré con tu melena al viento y tu mirar, y al ras de tu escote, tu lunar.
Ay, ay, amor; ay, ay, qué dolor.
Hoy muero de pensar que no voy a ser yo el que vas a amar.

[Coro]
Estos celos me hacen daño, me enloquecen;
jamás aprenderé a vivir sin ti.
Lo peor es que muy tarde comprendí, sí, sí:
contigo tenía todo y lo perdí, contigo tenía todo y lo perdí.

[Verso 2]
Te miré, me confundió el llanto que rodó; surgió una esperanza, pero no.
No, ya no hay amor, no, y fue mi error.
Y hoy muero de pensar que no voy a ser yo el que vas a amar.

[Coro]
Estos celos me hacen daño, me enloquecen;
jamás aprenderé a vivir sin ti.
Lo peor es que muy tarde comprendí, sí, sí:
contigo tenía todo y lo perdí, contigo tenía todo y lo perdí.
